calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF GENDER
Off Calendar Feb-07-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Gender Change and Issuance of New Birth Certificate.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Petitioner Michael W. Bradshaw present in court.
Petitioner sworn and examined.
Proof of Publication and Declaration of Sworn Physician on file.

No objections to the proposed gender change and issuance of New Birth Certificate were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations of the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.
The court grants the petition for Gender change from female to male.
Order for Change of Gender and issuance of New Birth Certificate signed in open court.
